title: Listening - Part 3
description: For each question, write the correct answer in the gap. Write one or two words or a number or a date or a time.
instructions: You will hear one person giving information. For questions 14–19, write the correct answer in the gap.
context: You will hear a man giving information about an open day at a sports centre.
audio_script: Man: Hello, everyone. Thank you for coming to this short meeting about the sports centre open day next month. We hope it will bring more people from the town into the centre, especially families. The open day will be on [14]Saturday[/14], not Sunday as we first planned, because there is a football match in the stadium on Sunday afternoon. Activities will begin at ten, but the building will open earlier for staff. The first class visitors can try is [15]yoga[/15]. It is popular with older members, but the teacher will make it simple enough for beginners. After that, there will be basketball and table tennis in the main hall. Parents with younger children should go to the [16]small gym[/16], where we are putting soft equipment and games. Please tell visitors that they do not have to book in advance, except for swimming, as space in the pool is limited. The swimming session starts at two fifteen, and tickets can be collected from the [17]desk[/17] beside the entrance. We also need volunteers to help people find the different rooms. If you can help, please wear a [18]green[/18] shirt so visitors know who to ask. Finally, drinks will be available all day, but lunch will only be served in the café from twelve until one thirty. A family lunch ticket will cost [19]six[/19] pounds. Posters are going up in schools tomorrow, and information will also appear on the centre website. Please check your email tonight, because I’ll send the final timetable before nine o’clock. If you have not worked at an open day before, don’t worry. Each volunteer will be paired with someone experienced during the busiest parts of the day.

questions.explanation: The speaker says the open day will be on Saturday, not Sunday.
The first class visitors can try is yoga.
